# Codex Plugin Creator Capability Pack Skill

Expert Codex plugin capability pack for safe plugin scaffolding, manifest quality, MCP integration, and maintainable distribution.

## Install
```bash
curl -L https://heyclau.de/downloads/skills/codex-plugin-creator-capability-pack.zip -o codex-plugin-creator-capability-pack.zip && unzip -o codex-plugin-creator-capability-pack.zip -d ./codex-plugin-creator-capability-pack
```

## Usage
Use this skill to scaffold and harden Codex plugins with explicit capabilities and low operational risk.
